content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Completed the pending t7j amendment on the current tree. In `src/adapters/worktree.rs`, `build_checkpoint_tree` now stages into the temporary index with `git add -A -- .`, enumerates tracked paths that Git treats as ignored via `git ls-files -z -i -c --exclude-standard` in that temp index, unions them with real-index `assume-unchanged` paths, and removes the combined set from the temporary index with `git update-index --force-remove -- ...` before `write-tree`. That fixes the regression where checkpoint commits could resurrect intentionally untracked ignored paths. In `tests/unit/checkpoint_test.rs`, the checkpoint assertions now require omission rather than parent-version preservation for tracked `.gitignore`, `.git/info/exclude`, `core.excludesFile`, `assume-unchanged`, real-index-untracked, and non-UTF-8 paths. Part B remains satisfied on the branch: `result` is no longer tracked, and `git ls-files -i -c --exclude-standard` is empty on the current tree.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Inspect the pending amendment against the current checkpoint implementation and regression tests, focusing on whether ignored paths were being restored into checkpoint trees instead of dropped.
2. [Completed] Update the checkpoint temp-index cleanup in `src/adapters/worktree.rs` so tracked ignored paths discovered in the temporary index and real-index `assume-unchanged` paths are removed with `git update-index --force-remove` after `git add -A -- .` and before `git write-tree`.
3. [Completed] Revise `tests/unit/checkpoint_test.rs` so the tracked ignored, real-index-untracked, `assume-unchanged`, `.git/info/exclude`, `core.excludesFile`, and non-UTF-8 cases assert omission from checkpoint commits rather than parent-version preservation.
4. [Completed] Run tracked-ignored index checks plus formatting, linting, focused checkpoint tests, the full requested test suite, and the authoritative `nix build` gate; capture the remaining unrelated failures.

## Validation Evidence

- `nl -ba src/adapters/worktree.rs | sed -n '130,240p'` shows the final checkpoint flow: `tracked_gitignored_paths` uses `git ls-files -z -i -c --exclude-standard` at lines 137-153, `assume_unchanged_paths` collects lowercase `ls-files -v` entries at lines 155-177, `remove_paths_from_index` uses `git update-index --force-remove --` at lines 179-197, and `build_checkpoint_tree` stages first then removes the filtered set at lines 213-223 before `write-tree`.
- `nl -ba tests/unit/checkpoint_test.rs | sed -n '70,640p'` shows the helper now asserts omission (`assert_checkpoint_omits_path` / `assert_checkpoint_omits_raw_path` at lines 80-148) and the regressions now cover omission for tracked gitignored files, `rm --cached` real-index-untracked files, `assume-unchanged`, `.git/info/exclude`, `core.excludesFile`, and non-UTF-8 paths at lines 348-610.
- `git ls-files -i -c --exclude-standard` returns no paths on the current branch.
- `git ls-files result` returns no output, confirming `result` is not tracked on the current tree.
- `git log --oneline -- result | head -n 5` shows `70eabf73 chore(git): stop tracking result symlink`, confirming the Part B untracking commit is present in branch history.
- `nix develop -c cargo fmt --check` exited 0.
- `nix develop -c cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings` exited 0.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub --test unit checkpoint_test:: -- --nocapture` exited 0; all 10 checkpoint tests passed, including `worktree_adapter_omits_tracked_gitignored_paths_from_checkpoint_commits`, `worktree_adapter_does_not_retrack_gitignored_paths_after_real_index_untracks_them`, `worktree_adapter_omits_assume_unchanged_paths_from_checkpoint_commits`, and the `.git/info/exclude`, `core.excludesFile`, and non-UTF-8 cases.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub` exited 101; the only reported failure was `workflow_engine_test::pre_commit_failure_remediation_survives_resume` at `tests/unit/workflow_engine_test.rs:8917`, with `ResumeFailed { reason: "stage review failed: remediation exhausted at cycle 4; maximum supported cycles is 3" }`.
- `nix build --rebuild -L --no-link` exited 1 with `error: some outputs of '/nix/store/13nxd3b5vhxcwy9gczzzqh5pbzqpjmnv-ralph-burning-static-x86_64-unknown-linux-musl-0.1.0.drv' are not valid, so checking is not possible`.

## Outstanding Risks

- The required full test suite is still red outside the checkpoint change scope: `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub` exits 101 because `workflow_engine_test::pre_commit_failure_remediation_survives_resume` fails with `ResumeFailed { reason: "stage review failed: remediation exhausted at cycle 4; maximum supported cycles is 3" }`.
- The authoritative gate is still red outside the checkpoint change scope: `nix build --rebuild -L --no-link` exits 1 with `error: some outputs of '/nix/store/13nxd3b5vhxcwy9gczzzqh5pbzqpjmnv-ralph-burning-static-x86_64-unknown-linux-musl-0.1.0.drv' are not valid, so checking is not possible`. Acceptance is not fully met until that passes.
